mapper.insert: INSERT INTO issues ( issue_type, status, reason_code, issue_handling, admin_required, urgency, admin_decision, worker_id, admin_id, batch_task_id, batch_task_item_id, zone_location_id, new_location_id, note ) VALUES ( #{issueType}, #{status}, #{reasonCode}, #{issueHandling}, #{adminRequired}, #{urgency}, #{adminDecision}, #{workerId}, #{adminId}, #{batchTaskId}, #{batchTaskItemId}, #{zoneLocationId}, #{newLocationId}, #{note} )
mapper.select: SELECT issue_id AS issueId, issue_type AS issueType, status, ai_decision AS aiDecision, reason_code AS reasonCode, webrtc_status AS webrtcStatus, issue_handling AS issueHandling, admin_required AS adminRequired, urgency, admin_decision AS adminDecision, worker_id AS workerId, admin_id AS adminId, batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, zone_location_id AS zoneLocationId, new_location_id AS newLocationId, created_at AS createdAt, resolved_at AS resolvedAt, note FROM issues WHERE issue_id = #{issueId}

SELECT issue_id AS issueId, issue_type AS issueType, status, ai_decision AS aiDecision, reason_code AS reasonCode, webrtc_status AS webrtcStatus, issue_handling AS issueHandling, admin_required AS adminRequired, urgency, admin_decision AS adminDecision, worker_id AS workerId, admin_id AS adminId, batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, zone_location_id AS zoneLocationId, new_location_id AS newLocationId, created_at AS createdAt, resolved_at AS resolvedAt, note FROM issues WHERE issue_id = #{issueId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE issues SET status = #{status}, webrtc_status = #{webrtcStatus}, reason_code = #{reasonCode}, issue_handling = #{issueHandling}, admin_required = #{adminRequired}, urgency = #{urgency}, admin_decision = #{adminDecision}, new_location_id = #{newLocationId}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt} WHERE issue_id = #{issueId}
UPDATE ai_judgments SET image_url = #{imageUrl}, ai_result = #{aiResult}, confidence = #{confidence}, ai_decision = #{aiDecision}, summary = #{summary} WHERE issue_id = #{issueId}
mapper.select: SELECT judgment_id AS judgmentId, issue_id AS issueId, image_url AS imageUrl, ai_result AS aiResult, confidence, ai_decision AS aiDecision, summary, created_at AS createdAt FROM ai_judgments WHERE issue_id = #{issueId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT count(DISTINCT i.issue_id) FROM issues i LEFT JOIN batch_task_items bti ON i.batch_task_item_id = bti.batch_task_item_id LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.batch_task_id = i.batch_task_id LEFT JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = COALESCE(i.zone_location_id, i.new_location_id, bt.current_location_id, bti.location_id) WHERE i.status = #{req.status}
AND zl.zone_id = #{req.zoneId}
